106:   logic [31:0] dbg_rdata;
107:   logic        dbg_resume;
108:   logic        dbg_halt;
109:   logic [5:0]  dbg_cause_q, dbg_cause_n;
110:   logic        dbg_ssth_q,  dbg_ssth_n;
111: 
112:   logic        ssth_clear;
113: 
114: 
115:   // ppc/npc tracking
116:   logic [31:0] ppc_int, npc_int;
117: 
118: 
119:   // address decoding, write and read controller
120:   always_comb
121:   begin
122:     rdata_sel_n    = RD_NONE;
123:     state_n        = FIRST;
124: 
125:     debug_gnt_o    = 1'b0;
126: 
127:     regfile_rreq_n = 1'b0;
128:     regfile_wreq   = 1'b0;
129:     csr_req_n      = 1'b0;
130:     csr_we_o       = 1'b0;
131:     jump_req_n     = 1'b0;
132: 
133:     dbg_resume     = 1'b0;
134:     dbg_halt       = 1'b0;
135:     settings_n     = settings_q;
136: 
137:     ssth_clear     = 1'b0;
138: 
139:     if (debug_req_i) begin
140:       if (debug_we_i) begin
141:         //----------------------------------------------------------------------------
142:         // write access
143:         //----------------------------------------------------------------------------
144:         if (debug_addr_i[14]) begin
145:           // CSR access
146:           if (state_q == FIRST) begin
147:             // only grant in second cycle, address and data have been latched by then
148:             debug_gnt_o = 1'b0;
149:             state_n     = SECOND;
150: 
151:             if (debug_halted_o) begin
152:               // access to internal registers are only allowed when the core is halted
153:               csr_req_n = 1'b1;
154:             end
155:           end else begin
156:             debug_gnt_o = 1'b1; // grant it even when invalid access to not block
157:             state_n     = FIRST;
158:             csr_we_o    = 1'b1;
159:           end
160:         end else begin
161:           // non-CSR access
162:           unique case (debug_addr_i[13:8])
163:             6'b00_0000: begin // Debug Registers, always accessible
164:               debug_gnt_o = 1'b1;
165: 
166:               unique case (debug_addr_i[6:2])
167:                 5'b0_0000: begin // DBG_CTRL
168:                   if (debug_wdata_i[16]) begin
169:                     // HALT set
170:                     if (~debug_halted_o) begin
171:                       // not halt, so STOP
172:                       dbg_halt = 1'b1;
173:                     end
174:                   end else begin
175:                     // RESUME set
176:                     if (debug_halted_o) begin
177:                       dbg_resume = 1'b1;
178:                     end
179:                   end
180: 
181:                   settings_n[DBG_SETS_SSTE] = debug_wdata_i[0];
182:                 end
183:                 5'b0_0001: begin // DBG_HIT
184:                   ssth_clear = debug_wdata_i[0];
185:                 end
186:                 5'b0_0010: begin // DBG_IE
187:                   settings_n[DBG_SETS_ECALL] = debug_wdata_i[11];
188:                   settings_n[DBG_SETS_ELSU]  = debug_wdata_i[7] | debug_wdata_i[5];
189:                   settings_n[DBG_SETS_EBRK]  = debug_wdata_i[3];
190:                   settings_n[DBG_SETS_EILL]  = debug_wdata_i[2];
191:                 end
192:                 default:;
193:               endcase
194:             end
195: 
196:             6'b10_0000: begin // Debug Registers, only accessible when in debug
197:               debug_gnt_o = 1'b1; // grant it even when invalid access to not block
198: 
199:               if (debug_halted_o) begin
200:                 unique case (debug_addr_i[6:2])
201:                   5'b0_0000: jump_req_n = 1'b1; // DNPC
202:                   default:;
203:                 endcase
204:               end
205:             end
206: 
207:             6'b00_0100: begin // General-Purpose Registers
208:               debug_gnt_o = 1'b1; // grant it even when invalid access to not block
209: 
210:               if (debug_halted_o) begin
211:                 regfile_wreq = 1'b1;
212:               end
213:             end
214: 
215:             default: debug_gnt_o = 1'b1; // grant it even when invalid access to not block
216:           endcase
217:         end
218:       end else begin
219:         //----------------------------------------------------------------------------
220:         // read access
221:         //----------------------------------------------------------------------------
222:         if (debug_addr_i[14]) begin
223:           debug_gnt_o = 1'b1; // grant it even when invalid access to not block
224: 
225:           // CSR access
226:           if (debug_halted_o) begin
227:             // access to internal registers are only allowed when the core is halted
228:             csr_req_n   = 1'b1;
229:             rdata_sel_n = RD_CSR;
230:           end
231:         end else begin
232:           // non-CSR access
233:           unique case (debug_addr_i[13:8])
234:             6'b00_0000: begin // Debug Registers, always accessible
235:               debug_gnt_o = 1'b1;
236: 
237:               rdata_sel_n = RD_DBGA;
238:             end
239: 
240:             6'b10_0000: begin // Debug Registers, only accessible when in debug
241:               debug_gnt_o = 1'b1; // grant it even when invalid access to not block
242: 
243:               rdata_sel_n = RD_DBGS;
244:             end
245: 
246:             6'b00_0100: begin // General-Purpose Registers
247:               debug_gnt_o = 1'b1; // grant it even when invalid access to not block
248: 
249:               if (debug_halted_o) begin
250:                 regfile_rreq_n = 1'b1;
251:                 rdata_sel_n    = RD_GPR;
252:               end
253:             end
254: 
255:             default: debug_gnt_o = 1'b1; // grant it even when invalid access to not block
256:           endcase
257:         end
258:       end
259:     end
260:   end

278:             dbg_rdata[31:16] = '0;
279:             dbg_rdata[15:12] = '0;
